query:
-- First add 5 more lessons to SPR101
INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, lessonOrder) VALUES
(150008, 'Spiritual Warfare and Prayer', '## Lesson Overview
This lesson explores the connection between prayer and spiritual warfare...

## Learning Objectives
- Understand biblical teaching on spiritual warfare
- Learn to pray with spiritual authority
- Develop strategies for warfare prayer

## Key Sections
### The Reality of Spiritual Warfare
Ephesians 6:12 reminds us that our struggle is not against flesh and blood...

### Weapons of Our Warfare
2 Corinthians 10:4 declares that our weapons are divinely powerful...

### Prayer as Spiritual Combat
Prayer is the primary means by which we engage in spiritual battle...

## Scripture References
- Ephesians 6:10-18
- 2 Corinthians 10:3-5
- James 4:7

## Summary
Spiritual warfare prayer is essential for advancing God''s kingdom.

---
*This content is protected and licensed to Larry Fisher.*', 6),
(150008, 'Corporate Prayer and Prayer Movements', '## Lesson Overview
This lesson examines the power and practice of corporate prayer...

## Learning Objectives
- Understand the biblical basis for corporate prayer
- Learn to lead effective prayer meetings
- Mobilize prayer movements

## Key Sections
### Biblical Examples of Corporate Prayer
Acts 1:14 shows the early church devoted to prayer together...

### Leading Prayer Gatherings
Effective prayer meetings require preparation and sensitivity to the Spirit...

### Prayer Movements in History
Great revivals have been preceded by united prayer movements...

## Scripture References
- Acts 1:14; 2:42
- Matthew 18:19-20
- 2 Chronicles 7:14

## Summary
Corporate prayer releases exponential spiritual power.

---
*This content is protected and licensed to Larry Fisher.*', 7),
(150008, 'Contemplative Prayer and Listening to God', '## Lesson Overview
This lesson explores contemplative prayer traditions and hearing God''s voice...

## Learning Objectives
- Understand contemplative prayer practices
- Develop skills for listening to God
- Integrate silence and solitude into prayer life

## Key Sections
### The Tradition of Contemplative Prayer
Throughout church history, believers have practiced contemplative prayer...

### Listening Prayer
John 10:27 - My sheep hear my voice...

### Silence and Solitude
Jesus regularly withdrew to solitary places to pray (Luke 5:16)...

## Scripture References
- Psalm 46:10
- 1 Kings 19:11-13
- John 10:27

## Summary
Contemplative prayer deepens our intimacy with God.

---
*This content is protected and licensed to Larry Fisher.*', 8),
(150008, 'Prayer and Revival', '## Lesson Overview
This lesson examines the connection between prayer and spiritual awakening...

## Learning Objectives
- Study historical revivals and their prayer foundations
- Understand principles of revival prayer
- Pray effectively for spiritual awakening

## Key Sections
### Historical Revivals and Prayer
Every great revival has been preceded by extraordinary prayer...

### Principles of Revival Prayer
2 Chronicles 7:14 outlines the conditions for revival...

### Praying for Awakening Today
How to pray for revival in our generation...

## Scripture References
- 2 Chronicles 7:14
- Habakkuk 3:2
- Psalm 85:6

## Summary
Prayer is the catalyst for spiritual revival.

---
*This content is protected and licensed to Larry Fisher.*', 9),
(150008, 'Developing a Lifestyle of Prayer', '## Lesson Overview
This lesson focuses on integrating prayer into every aspect of life...

## Learning Objectives
- Develop sustainable prayer habits
- Overcome obstacles to consistent prayer
- Create a personal prayer plan

## Key Sections
### Prayer as a Lifestyle
1 Thessalonians 5:17 - Pray without ceasing...

### Overcoming Prayer Obstacles
Common hindrances to prayer and how to overcome them...

### Creating Your Prayer Plan
Practical steps for developing a sustainable prayer life...

## Scripture References
- 1 Thessalonians 5:17
- Colossians 4:2
- Luke 18:1

## Summary
Prayer should permeate every area of our lives.

---
*This content is protected and licensed to Larry Fisher.*', 10);

-- Get all SPR101 lesson IDs
SELECT id, title, lessonOrder FROM lessons WHERE courseId = 150008 ORDER BY lessonOrder;

rows.title: The Lord's Prayer - A Model for All Prayer
Intercessory Prayer - Standing in the Gap
Contemplative Prayer and Listening to God
